{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-32179", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-191", "name": "Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound)"}], "description": "### Summary
Improper input validation in Microsoft QUIC allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

### Details
 Improper Input Validation Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound) when decoding ACK frame.

#### Patches
- Fix underflow in ACK frame parsing - 1e6e999b

### Impact
An attacker who successfully exploited this vulnerability could gain elevated privileges.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00075, "percentile": 0.22825}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gvvw-8j96-8g5r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T01:04:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gvvw-8j96-8g5r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gvvw-8j96-8g5r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32179"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-16T01:04:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/microsoft/msquic/security/advisories/GHSA-gvvw-8j96-8g5r", "https://github.com/microsoft/msquic/commit/1e6e999b199430effeefee3d85baa0c9dd35ad5e", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gvvw-8j96-8g5r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/microsoft/msquic/security-advisories/GHSA-gvvw-8j96-8g5r", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/microsoft/msquic", "summary": "MsQuic has a Remote Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T15:19:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gvvw-8j96-8g5r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.5.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Microsoft.Native.Quic.MsQuic.OpenSSL"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.5.0-ci.532574, < 2.5.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.5.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Microsoft.Native.Quic.MsQuic.Schannel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.5.0-ci.532574, < 2.5.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.4.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Microsoft.Native.Quic.MsQuic.Schannel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.4.18"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.4.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Microsoft.Native.Quic.MsQuic.OpenSSL"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.4.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
